calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Chris Crow appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Crows Auto Sales.
Dan Scanlan appeared on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff Autoreturn.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Parties stipulated to a Judge Pro Tem.

Dan Scanlan testifies on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff Autoreturn.
Chris Crow testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Crows Auto Sales.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Appellant/Defendant's A: Letter from Autoreturn to Crows Auto Sales re: impound.
Appellant/Defendant's B: Bill from Autoreturn.

After hearing and considering the testimony and evidence presented, the court affirms the Judgment, granted Respondent/Plaintiff Autoreturn a judgment in principal amount of $1,231.75, costs $215.00, for a total Judgment of $1,446.75.

Judgment on appeal is final and case is remanded back to Small Claims Court.
Appellant/Defendant's exhibits retained by the court.
Dept. 525 Judge Pro Tem: David Fleisig; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Continued To Feb-13-18 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
